request_payload.exposure_text: As a former senior defense analyst, I've seen firsthand how strategic autonomy protects us. When allies hesitate, we need reliable partners—not just promises. The 2024 European crisis showed that countries with strong domestic defense capabilities faced fewer disruptions. Let's invest in our own security so we're never left vulnerable again. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
